summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Payments + Fulfillment Governance Pack. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (94.7%). Frontend: All critical flows working. Fixed ProductOrPromoDetailModal crash when colors/sizes are objects.

minor.issue: Creates empty invoice when quote_id is missing instead of returning 400 validation error

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the Confirm & Pay button at bottom (known issue from previous iteration)

action_items: Consider adding validation to /api/payments-governance/quote/accept to return 400 when quote_id is missing
critical_code_review_comments: ProductOrPromoDetailModal.jsx: Fixed crash when colors/sizes arrays contain objects with {name, hex} structure instead of strings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance flow fully tested: product checkout creates invoice (not order), payment intent, proof upload (no transaction reference), finance queue shows pending proofs, finance approve creates order. Sales role correctly blocked from approving. Admin orders split view working. Product detail modal fixed for object-type colors/sizes.

backend: POST /api/payments-governance/invoice/payment-intent creates payment intent with amount_due (full and deposit mode) ✓
POST /api/payments-governance/payment-proof uploads proof without transaction reference field ✓
GET /api/payments-governance/finance/queue returns pending proofs with invoice details ✓
frontend: Marketplace has 3 tabs: Products, Services, Promotional Materials ✓
Product cards with Add to Cart buttons ✓
Product detail modal opens when clicking product image/name ✓
Cart drawer opens with items and quantity controls ✓
Cart checkout step shows contact/delivery/invoice details ✓
Finance queue at /admin/finance-queue shows pending proofs with approve/reject buttons ✓
Admin orders page at /admin/orders shows split-view with table/card toggle ✓
